title: Engine hot-reloads ~/.sweech/config.json
description: Engine watches providers.yaml but not config.json. Profile mutations through CLI require daemon stop && start before the daemon API reflects them. Stale state risk in the very HTTP API agents depend on.

context.text: Source (verbatim from 2026-05-16 audit): Audit Section 1: "Daemon doesn't watch config.json. Engine only hot-reloads providers.yaml; profile mutations via CLI require daemon stop && start"

Verified implemented T-040 contract: packages/engine/src/middleware/profiles.ts watches the config.json parent directory with debounce, reloads the cached profile snapshot, handles atomic rename/delete/recreate, and uses a generation guard so stale in-flight reads cannot overwrite a newer reload. packages/engine/src/daemon/index.ts starts the watcher on daemon boot. Gates: npm --prefix packages/engine test -- src/__tests__/middleware/profiles-hot-reload.test.ts (7 passed); npm --prefix packages/engine run typecheck.

acceptanceCriteria: fs.watch on ~/.sweech/config.json triggers loadProfiles() with debounce
In-flight requests use the old snapshot; new requests use the reloaded set
Handles atomic-rename writes (vim, jq -i) — not just inotify IN_MODIFY
